'''Reess Kairn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Unknown to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], Kairn had married a woman on his homeworld of [[Homeworld/Legends|Ryloth]], whom he later murdered after discovering her infidelity. Turning to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], Kairn fled the Order and paid for [[Reconstructive surgery/Legends|reconstructive surgery]] to change his appearance to that of a [[Human/Legends|Human]] female. After hiding within the [[Order of the Ffib]] for several years, Kairn was hunted down by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] and killed.

==Biography==
[[File:Reess_Kairn_attacks_Ffib.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Kairn murders four Ffib priests.]]
Reess Kairn was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] who reached the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. On [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], Kairn met a female with whom he fell in love, marrying her against the tenets of the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]] and without the knowledge of the High Council. Keeping their love secret, Kairn remained an active Jedi, returning every so often to be with his wife.<ref name="TBHAS" />

On one occasion, Kairn returned to his home on Ryloth to find his mate with another man. Enraged, Kairn killed them both in his anger, before burning his home to the ground. Fearful of the punishment the High Council would seek against him, Kairn fled the Jedi Order and began a new life of [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]]. Establishing a pirate crew, Kairn sunk deeper into the grasp of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] and began raiding mines and trade ships throughout the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TBHAS" />

His last known raid was on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lorahns/Legends|Lorahns]], where he ransacked the [[Great Temple (Lorahns)|Great Temple]] of the [[Order of the Ffib]], and killed four [[Daughters of the Ffib|priests]] during his departure. Escaping with priceless artifacts, Kairn disbanded his crew and took steps to hide his trail from the Ffib Inquisitors. He hired three [[Shi'ido]] to simulate his appearance and they dispersed across the galaxy. His own appearance was changed on [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]] through [[Reconstructive surgery/Legends|reconstructive surgery]] by outlaw surgeons. He told himself he was honoring and atoning for murdering his wife and the members of the Order of the Ffib by altering his apparent [[Species/Legends|species]] and gender into that of a [[Human/Legends|Human]] or [[Near-Human]] female.<ref name="TBHAS" /> Kairn infilitrated the Order of the Ffib disguised as a priestess<ref name="CSWECite" /> who was blind; a blindfold covered lopsided scars from the surgery.<ref name="TBHAS" />

In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],<ref name="DHCT" /> after Kairn retreated to the [[Endor/Legends|Sanctuary Moon]] of [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]], the "blind priestess" contracted the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] to hunt down and kill "Reess Kairn". Claiming that the real Kairn had hired two Shi'ido to impersonate him, Kairn hoped that Sing would eliminate all three impersonators and believe that one was indeed the real Kairn. After Sing had traveled to [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], and [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and killed each impersonator, she realized that she had been deceived and returned to Endor. While Kairn hired the [[Thranta Mercenaries]] to eliminate Sing should she discover the treachery, Sing appeared in Kairn's hut and fired a fatal shot into the back of Kairn's head.<ref name="TBHAS" />
